subcodes.first_line: Through My remembrance have the veils been rent asunder, through My Name hath the land been illumined, and through My sovereignty have the pillars of them that disbelieved been made to tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بذکری خرقت الاحجاب و باسمی نورت البلاد و بسلطانی تزلزلت ارکان الذین هم کفروا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action
